task_completion.description: Agent accessed the SEB Server web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost:8080 showing the SEB Server login screen or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Agent created a new configuration with the specified name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration form is visible with 'Engineering Legacy Final 2026' entered into the configuration name field.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the settings section containing the User Agent Suffix field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific settings tab (typically under Browser, Network, or Exam settings) is open, and a field labeled 'User Agent Suffix' or similar is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct network identification token into the User Agent Suffix field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'EngDept/LegacyAuth-v9' is typed into the User Agent Suffix input field.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully saved the new configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Configuration saved') is visible, or the configuration 'Engineering Legacy Final 2026' appears in the list of saved exam configurations.

integrity.description: Agent used a genuine web browser to interact with the SEB Server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating to localhost:8080, rather than a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the graphical user interface to create the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the agent clicking through the SEB Server web UI forms, rather than executing curl commands or database scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open, ensuring the text on screen is from actual form input and not DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Configuration Name must be exactly 'Engineering Legacy Final 2026'. Target User Agent Suffix must be exactly 'EngDept/LegacyAuth-v9'.
